title: Track lack of copyright and license headers
description: Ensures that all Python files have a copyright and license header.
message: File should have a copyright and license header.
recommendation: Add copyright and license headers to all Python files.
why_is_this_an_issue: Lack of copyright and license headers can lead to legal issues and reputation damage.
how_to_fix: Add copyright and license headers to all Python files.
